executives.name: Gregg Lowe
executives.background: Gregg A. Lowe joined Wolfspeed in September 2017 as President and Chief Executive Officer and a member of the Board of Directors. Prior to joining Wolfspeed, Mr. Lowe served as President and Chief Executive Officer of Freescale Semiconductor, Ltd. from 2012 until its merger with NXP Semiconductors N.V. in 2015. He previously held various executive positions at Texas Instruments Incorporated.

executives.name: Jack Lazar
executives.background: Former CFO of GoPro and Atheros Communications. He serves on several public company boards.

executives.name: John Hollister
executives.background: John Hollister is the Chief Financial Officer of GlobalFoundries. He joined GF in 2024 from Silicon Labs, where he served as CFO for over 10 years. He has extensive experience in financial management, strategic planning, and investor relations within the semiconductor industry.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Sumit Sadana
executives.background: Sumit Sadana is Executive Vice President and Chief Business Officer. He joined Micron in 2017 from SanDisk, where he was Executive Vice President and Chief Strategy Officer.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors / Lead Independent Director
